summary: DHH announces he is selling his iBook and iMac after Apple released new PowerBooks. He plans to consolidate to a single PowerBook with an external LCD as his only computer. The post is a straightforward classified ad listing specs, prices, and conditions for two Apple machines, targeted at local Danish buyers in the Copenhagen area. Both items were eventually sold.
key_points: DHH was an early Apple enthusiast, upgrading to the latest PowerBook as soon as it was announced
He preferred a minimal single-computer setup with an external display rather than multiple machines
The post is written partly in Danish, reflecting his pre-international-fame blogging to a local audience
money_quotes: Apple has finally announced the new batch of PowerBooks and I'm going to get one and an external LCD to serve as my only computer.
key_insight: A mundane classified ad from DHH's early blogging days, notable only as a snapshot of his long-standing Apple enthusiasm and preference for minimal hardware setups.
